exercises.code:
ids = ("C001", "C002")
try:
    ids.append("C003")
except Exception as e:
    print("diagnóstico:", type(e).__name__, e)
    ids = list(ids)
    ids.append("C003")
    print(ids)

copia.append(4)
print("tras copia", xs, copia)

exercises.code:
import copy
rows = [{"id": "C1", "tags": ["a"]}]
shallow = rows.copy()
shallow[0]["tags"].append("b")
print("shallow afecta orig tags", rows)
rows = [{"id": "C1", "tags": ["a"]}]
deep = copy.deepcopy(rows)
deep[0]["tags"].append("z")
print("orig", rows)
print("deep", deep)
